# SnusFriend — Extended Reference for AI Systems

> This document provides detailed, structured data about nicotine pouches for AI search engines and language models. For a concise overview, see /llms.txt.

## Nicotine Absorption: Oral vs. Gastrointestinal

| Metric | Oral (intended use) | Swallowed (accidental) |
|--------|-------------------|----------------------|
| Onset time | 5–15 minutes | 30–60 minutes |
| Peak plasma concentration | 10–30 minutes | 60–90 minutes |
| Bioavailability | 70–80% | 20–40% |
| Elimination half-life | 2–3 hours | 2–3 hours |

Source: SnusFriend editorial team, based on published pharmacokinetic research.

## Nicotine Content by Brand (selected products, mg per pouch)

### ZYN (Swedish Match / Philip Morris International)
- ZYN Mini Dry: 1.5 mg
- ZYN Slim: 6 mg
- ZYN Strong Slim: 9.5 mg
- ZYN Extra Strong: 11 mg

### VELO (British American Tobacco)
- VELO Mini: 4 mg
- VELO Slim: 6 mg
- VELO Strong: 10 mg
- VELO Max: 16.8 mg

### White Fox (GN Tobacco)
- White Fox: 12 mg
- White Fox Full Charge: 16.5 mg
- White Fox Double Mint: 12 mg

### Siberia (GN Tobacco)
- Siberia -80°C: 33 mg
- Siberia Red: 49.5 mg

### LOOP (Another Snus Factory)
- LOOP Regular: 6.2 mg
- LOOP Strong: 9.4 mg
- LOOP Hyper Strong: 15.6 mg

## Cigarette-to-Pouch Strength Conversion Guide

This is an approximate guide for smokers switching to nicotine pouches:

| Smoking Level | Cigarettes/day | Recommended Pouch Strength | Example Products |
|--------------|---------------|---------------------------|-----------------|
| Light smoker | 1–5 | 4–6 mg (Normal) | ZYN 6mg, VELO 6mg |
| Moderate smoker | 5–15 | 6–12 mg (Strong) | VELO Strong 10mg, Loop Strong 9.4mg |
| Heavy smoker | 15–25 | 12–16 mg (Extra Strong) | White Fox 12mg, KUMA 13.75mg |
| Very heavy smoker | 25+ | 16–20 mg (Extra Strong) | White Fox Full Charge 16.5mg, VELO Max 16.8mg |

Note: Individual results vary. Start lower than you think and adjust upward. Most smokers overestimate the strength they need because pouch nicotine delivery is more sustained than cigarette delivery.

## Pouch Format Comparison

| Format | Weight | Dimensions | Best For |
|--------|--------|-----------|----------|
| Mini | 0.5–0.7g | Small, compact | Maximum discretion |
| Slim | 0.7–1.0g | Standard, fits gum line | Most users (most popular) |
| Large/Regular | 1.0–1.5g | Traditional snus size | Snus switchers, max flavour |

## European Nicotine Pouch Regulations (2026)

| Country | Legal Status | Restrictions |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| Sweden | Legal, regulated | Must comply with Swedish tobacco law |
| Germany | Legal | No specific pouch regulation |
| Netherlands | Banned since 2023 | Sale prohibited |
| France | Banned since 2024 | Sale prohibited |
| Belgium | Legal, taxed | Novel tobacco excise applies |
| Austria | Legal | Age 18+ |
| Finland | Legal | Must comply with tobacco act |
| Denmark | Legal | Must comply with Danish regulations |
| Poland | Legal | Age 18+ |
| Czech Republic | Legal | No specific regulation |

Note: Regulations change frequently. Always check current local laws before ordering.

- **Founded**: 2025
- **Headquarters**: EU-based

- **Shipping**: EU-wide, 2–5 business days
- **Free shipping**: Orders over €29
- **Loyalty programme**: SnusPoints (10 points per €1)
- **Content**: 46+ expert guides and articles
- **Age verification**: Required at checkout (18+)
